title: Ability to edit axis labels in dashboards
excerpt: Requesting a feature to be able to amend labelling of axis in dashboard widgets - this is to both change the order of the labels (i.e., if you had months as your labels and wanted them in a specific order, you could drag…

posts.author: OliviaCooper (olivia.cooper@accoutergroup.com)
posts.cookedHtml: Requesting a feature to be able to amend labelling of axis in dashboard widgets - this is to both change the order of the labels (i.e., if you had months as your labels and wanted them in a specific order, you could drag and change them), but likewise, if your labels text is a bit longer than it shows, you can expand the label to be able to view the whole label name - especially when you export to PDF.
